nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Madagascar pygmy kingfisher
nodes.summary: The Madagascar pygmy kingfisher (Corythornis madagascariensis) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae. It is endemic to Madagascar and found in western dry deciduous forests. The first formal description of the Madagascan pygmy kingfisher was by the Swedish naturalist Carl Linnaeus in 1758 in the twelfth edition of his Systema Naturae under the binomial name Alcedo madagascariensis. Although it has been placed in the genera Ceyx and Ispidina in the past, a study of its molecular phylogenetic relationships with other genera in the region suggests it is best treated as a member of the genus Corythornis. References

nodes.name: Corythornis
nodes.summary: Corythornis（Corythornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Madagascar pygmy kingfisher、White-bellied kingfisher、Malagasy kingfisher等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: 马达加斯加
nodes.summary: 马达加斯加是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联45种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、厚嘴棉鳧、馬島潛鴨等45种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。
